summary: Design-only iteration. All 5 acceptance criteria (US-3-1 through US-3-5) verified complete. 8 flows documented in Pencil, 9 design tokens set, SOAT upload flow fully designed (6 screens + 4 badge variants), handoff document complete. Hard gate for Iteration 3b CLEARED. dart analyze and flutter test baseline green (no regression from design changes).
